## ⚙️ Chore: Dependency Update
Installing new packages or bumping versions.

### 📝 Description
Maintenance tasks and dependency management.

### 🛠️ Changes Details
- Bumped `laravel/framework` from v13.4.0 to v13.5.0.
- Installed `spatie/laravel-ray`.

### ✅ Verification
- [ ] `composer update` successful and `composer.lock` updated.
- [ ] No dependency conflicts.
- [ ] Application builds without errors (`php artisan optimize:clear`).
- [ ] All automated tests passed (`php artisan test`) on local environment.
- [ ] Test verified on local environment.
- [ ] Changes do not affect business logic or features.
- [ ] Documentation has been updated (if applicable).
